sources.name: Liechtenstein Constitutional Court (Staatsgerichtshof)
sources.notes: Constitutional Court (StGH) decisions via gerichtsentscheidungen.li. HTML scraping with full text extraction. 15 sample records with avg 37K chars/doc. German language. Open Government Data license.

sources.name: Lithuanian Constitutional Court (Konstitucinis Teismas)
sources.notes: Fixed issue #108. Constitutional Court decisions via data.gov.lt TAR API. 1,304 documents (rulings, decisions, conclusions, orders, announcements). Full text in Lithuanian. 12 sample records avg 11K c

sources.name: Lithuanian Parliament (Seimas)
sources.notes: Parliamentary publications (press releases, meeting agendas, committee work plans, statements) via data.gov.lt Open Data API. Full text in tekstas_lt field. 12 sample records (77% with text, avg 2.1K

sources.name: Luxembourgian Chamber of Deputies
sources.notes: Parliamentary written questions and answers from data.public.lu Open Data. Full text of questions and ministerial responses in FR/LB/DE. 15 sample records, avg 5.1K chars/doc. License: CC0.

sources.name: Luxembourg Court of Cassation (Cour de Cassation)
sources.notes: Court of Cassation decisions via data.public.lu Open Data. 2,346 pseudonymized PDFs. Full text extracted via pdfplumber. 15 sample records, avg 39K chars/doc. License: CC BY-ND.

sources.name: Latvian Parliament (Saeima)
sources.notes: Full stenogram transcripts from 5th-14th Saeima (1993-present). ~1,600+ transcripts with full debate text. Fetched from /lv/transcripts/view/{ID} HTML pages. 12 sample records with avg 218K chars/doc.

sources.name: Latvian Supreme Court (Senāts)
sources.notes: Fixed issue #68. Now uses weekly date ranges to avoid 100-result search cap. Full archive pagination working (2017-present). 12 sample records with avg 4K chars/doc. Uses ECLI metadata API + PDF text

sources.name: Dutch Supreme Court (Hoge Raad)
sources.notes: Fixed #113: Uses year-based pagination (1998-present) to bypass API offset limit of ~42,000. 128K decisions available across ~27 years.

sources.name: Dutch House of Representatives (Tweede Kamer)
sources.notes: Parliamentary proceedings via OData v4 API. 12 sample records, avg 246K chars/doc. Full debate transcripts with speaker names and timestamps. [NOTE: This is parliamentary proceedings, NOT enacted legi

sources.name: Polish Constitutional Court (Trybunał Konstytucyjny)
sources.notes: Constitutional Court decisions from SAOS API (saos.org.pl). 8,000+ judgments from 1985-present. Full text via /api/judgments/{id} endpoint. 12 samples avg 66K chars/doc. CC-BY license.

sources.name: Polish Sejm (Parliament)
sources.notes: Parliamentary transcripts and interpellations from Polish Sejm via api.sejm.gov.pl. Full text HTML available. 12 sample records (avg 3.8K chars/doc). Coverage: Term 10 (2023-present) with historical t

sources.name: Polish Supreme Court (Sąd Najwyższy)
sources.notes: Fixed #116. Added checkpoint/resume support for 38K+ records. SAOS API with full text. Use --no-checkpoint to disable. 12 sample records with avg 6.7K chars/doc.

sources.name: Portuguese Constitutional Court (Tribunal Constitucional)
sources.notes: Constitutional Court decisions (Acórdãos) from 1983 to present. 12 sample records fetched, avg 41K chars/doc. Direct URL access pattern: /tc/acordaos/{YYYY}{NNNN}.html. Full text extracted from HTML p

sources.name: Portuguese Supreme Court (Supremo Tribunal de Justiça)
sources.notes: Supreme Court case law (Acórdãos) from STJ jurisprudence portal. Uses Next.js API at juris.stj.pt/api/search for discovery, then extracts full text from __NEXT_DATA__. 12 sample records fetched, avg 5

sources.name: Riksdag - Swedish Parliament
sources.notes: Swedish Parliament open data API. Covers propositions (prop), motions (mot), committee reports (bet), parliamentary decisions (rskr). 500K+ documents with full HTML text. 12 samples avg 220K chars/doc

sources.name: Swedish Supreme Administrative Court (Högsta förvaltningsdomstolen)
sources.notes: Fixed issue #68. Now uses Domstolsverket Open Data API (rattspraxis.etjanst.domstol.se/api/v1) instead of RSS. 1,341 HFD decisions available. HTML full text via innehall field, PDF fallback for attach

sources.name: Swedish Supreme Court (Högsta domstolen)

sources.name: Slovak Supreme Court (Najvyšší súd)
sources.notes: Fixed #115. Added checkpoint/resume for 104K+ decisions. ID-based iteration with exponential backoff for 429 errors. 12 sample records avg 17K chars/doc.

sources.name: Andorra Official Gazette (BOPA)
sources.notes: Butlletí Oficial del Principat d'Andorra. Azure Functions API + Blob Storage for HTML full text. 12 sample records with avg 8.8K chars/doc. Catalan language. Electronic official version from 2015-pres

sources.name: German Federal Social Court (BSG)
sources.notes: Fixed #117. Discovery via rii-toc.xml TOC (not RSS). 6,285 BSG decisions available. 12 sample records with avg 26K chars/doc. Full text via ZIP XML downloads. CC BY 4.0.

sources.name: Bavaria State Law (BAYERN.RECHT)

sources.name: North Rhine-Westphalia State Law (recht.nrw.de)

sources.name: Saxony State Law (REVOSAX)
sources.notes: Saxon state legislation via REVOSAX. 6,232+ laws accessible via sitemap.xml. Full HTML text at /vorschrift_gesamt/{id}/{version}.html URLs. Covers Gesetze, Verordnungen, Verwaltungsvorschriften. Publi

sources.name: Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF)
sources.notes: Fixed issue #78: Doctrine samples now correctly extract full text from PDFs. French financial regulator decisions (SAN-YYYY-NN) and doctrine (DOC-YYYY-NN). RSS feeds + PDF text extraction via pdfplumb

sources.name: Monaco Official Journal (Journal de Monaco)
sources.notes: Monaco Official Journal (Journal de Monaco). HTML scraping of journaldemonaco.gouv.mc. 15 sample records with full text (avg 1.2K chars/doc). Covers Ordonnances Souveraines, Arrêtés Ministériels, Lois

sources.name: Swedish Courts (Domstolsverket)

sources.name: San Marino Official Legislation (Bollettino Ufficiale)
sources.notes: Complete. 12 sample records with full text (avg 9.4K chars/doc). PDF extraction via pdfplumber. Covers Leggi Costituzionali, Leggi Qualificate, Leggi Ordinarie, Decreti, Regolamenti. Electronic bullet

sources.name: Hungarian Constitutional Court (Alkotmánybíróság)

sources.name: Baden-Württemberg State Law (Landesrecht BW)
sources.notes: From issue #88. JavaScript SPA (Juris portal), no API. Requires browser automation.

sources.name: Berlin State Law (Gesetze Berlin)
sources.notes: From issue #88. JavaScript SPA (Juris portal), same platform as BadenWuerttemberg. No API discovered. Requires browser automation.

sources.name: Hamburg State Law (Landesrecht HH)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/BadenWuerttemberg and DE/Berlin. Transparenzportal has no legislation datasets.

sources.name: Hessen State Law (Hessenrecht)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/Hamburg/Berlin/BadenWuerttemberg. opendata.hessen.de has no legislation datasets.

sources.name: Mecklenburg-Vorpommern State Law (Landesrecht MV)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/Hamburg/Berlin/BadenWuerttemberg/Hessen. 31K+ documents in sitemap but all URLs return JS shell. No pre-rendered HTML endpoints.

sources.name: Niedersachsen State Law (VORIS)

sources.name: Rheinland-Pfalz State Law (Landesrecht RLP)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/Hamburg/Berlin/BadenWuerttemberg/Hessen/MecklenburgVorpommern. Redirects to /bsrp/ SPA.

sources.name: Saarland State Law (recht.saarland.de)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/Hamburg/Berlin/BadenWuerttemberg/Hessen/MecklenburgVorpommern. ~1,500 URLs in sitemap.

sources.name: Sachsen-Anhalt State Law (Landesrecht ST)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as DE/Hamburg/Berlin/BadenWuerttemberg/Hessen/MecklenburgVorpommern/Saarland. Sitemap has ~3000 URLs but all pages require JavaScript render

sources.name: Schleswig-Holstein State Law (Landesrecht SH)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as other blocked German states.

sources.name: Thüringen State Law (Landesrecht TH)
sources.notes: Juris React SPA requiring browser automation. Same platform as other blocked German states.

sources.notes: From issue #107. French ombudsman decisions and recommendations. Uses PMB library system (SIGB) at juridique.defenseurdesdroits.fr. Documents are PDFs only, no REST API, no bulk download, no RSS feed.
